corrections.text: The article states 'First authors Yurekli and Hashem described the significance…', characterising Nazlican Yurekli and Reem Hashem as first authors. According to the published Nature Nanotechnology paper (DOI: 10.1038/s41565-026-02151-y), the co-first authors who contributed equally are Dijo Moonnukandathil Joseph and Nazlican Yurekli. Reem Hashem is a co-author but is not listed as a first author. The quote attributed to Yurekli and Hashem is verbatim and correctly sourced; only the 'first authors' characterisation is inaccurate.
